name: Bosch Rexroth A4VSO Axial Piston Pump 40cc
description: The Bosch Rexroth A4VSO is a swashplate design axial piston pump for industrial and mobile hydraulic systems. This 40cc displacement pump delivers up to 350 bar continuous pressure with a pressure regulator control.
shortDescription: Axial piston pump, 40cc/rev, 350 bar, pressure regulator, SAE mount.
technicalDescription: Swashplate axial piston pump in bent-axis design for open circuits. 40 cc/rev displacement, pressure regulator (DR) control, SAE A two-bolt mount, and SAE side ports. Through-drive capability for tandem pump configurations.
benefits: High power density reduces installation space
Low noise operation meets workplace standards
Long service life with hydrostatic bearings

images.alt: Bosch Rexroth A4VSO Axial Piston Pump

seoTitle: Bosch Rexroth A4VSO Axial Piston Pump 40cc
seoDescription: Bosch Rexroth A4VSO 40cc axial piston pump, 350 bar, pressure regulator. For industrial and mobile hydraulic systems.

faq.question: What hydraulic fluids are compatible?
faq.answer: Compatible with HLP mineral oils per DIN 51524. Phosphate ester and biodegradable fluids available with special seals.

faq.question: What is the filtration requirement?
faq.answer: Recommended filtration is ISO 18/16/13 with a 10 micron absolute filter.

faq.question: Can multiple pumps be driven together?
faq.answer: Yes, the through-drive shaft allows mounting of a second pump (up to the same size) in tandem.

name: Parker F11 Fixed Displacement Hydraulic Motor
description: The Parker F11 is a fixed displacement bent-axis hydraulic motor designed for high-speed, high-power applications. With 10cc displacement, it delivers smooth rotation for machine tool spindles, winches, and conveyor drives.
shortDescription: Bent-axis hydraulic motor, 10cc, 350 bar, high-speed, SAE mount.
technicalDescription: Fixed displacement bent-axis piston motor with 10 cc/rev displacement. Designed for open and closed circuits with integrated drain port. SAE A mount with 1/2" SAE O-ring ports.
features: High speed capability up to 5,000 rpm
Suitable for open and closed circuits
benefits: Smooth operation from low to high speeds
High starting torque for demanding loads
Long service life with robust construction
seoTitle: Parker F11 Fixed Displacement Hydraulic Motor
seoDescription: Parker F11 bent-axis hydraulic motor, 10cc, 350 bar, 5,000 rpm. For machine spindles, winches, and conveyor drives.

faq.question: What is the maximum case pressure?
faq.answer: Maximum case pressure is 3 bar (continuous). External drain line required for high-speed operation.

faq.question: What direction of rotation?
faq.answer: The motor is reversible. Direction is determined by port connection (A or B pressurized).

faq.question: What is the filtration recommendation?
faq.answer: ISO 18/16/13 or better with 10 micron absolute filter.

name: Eaton H-Series Hydraulic Cylinder 2" Bore x 12" Stroke
description: The Eaton H-Series hydraulic cylinder is a heavy-duty tie-rod cylinder for industrial and mobile applications. With a 2-inch bore and 12-inch stroke, it provides reliable linear force for clamping, lifting, and pressing operations.
shortDescription: Tie-rod hydraulic cylinder, 2" bore, 12" stroke, 3,000 psi, double-acting.
technicalDescription: NFPA tie-rod hydraulic cylinder with 2-inch bore, 12-inch stroke, and 1.375-inch rod diameter. Double-acting with cushioning on both ends. Pressure rating 3,000 psi with 5,000 psi non-shock.
features: NFPA tie-rod construction per ANSI B93.1
benefits: Interchangeable with other NFPA tie-rod cylinders
Cushions reduce impact at end of stroke
Reliable sealing with polyurethane wiper seals
seoTitle: Eaton H-Series Hydraulic Cylinder 2" Bore x 12" Stroke
seoDescription: Eaton H-Series tie-rod hydraulic cylinder, 2" bore, 12" stroke, 3,000 psi. For machine clamping, presses, and material handling.

faq.question: What mounting styles are available?
faq.answer: Available with cap flange, rod flange, clevis, trunnion, and foot mounting options.

faq.question: What seal materials are standard?
faq.answer: Standard seals are polyurethane (rod) and nitrile rubber (piston). Viton seals are available for high-temperature applications.

faq.question: Can the cushions be adjusted?
faq.answer: Yes, both end cushions have adjustable needles for deceleration control.

name: Parker Bladder Accumulator 1 Gallon 3,000 PSI
description: The Parker bladder accumulator stores hydraulic energy for peak demand, shock absorption, and emergency power. This 1-gallon accumulator is pre-charged with nitrogen and rated for 3,000 PSI.
shortDescription: Bladder-type accumulator, 1 gallon, 3,000 PSI, ASME certified.
technicalDescription: Bladder-type hydraulic accumulator with butyl rubber bladder, steel shell, and gas valve cap. ASME Section VIII stamped. Includes O-ring seal kit and pre-charge fitting.
benefits: Absorbs hydraulic shocks and pressure spikes
Provides emergency power for safety functions
seoDescription: Parker BA0010 bladder accumulator, 1 gallon, 3,000 PSI, ASME certified. For hydraulic energy storage and shock suppression.

faq.question: What is proper pre-charge pressure?
faq.answer: Pre-charge should be 80-90% of minimum system pressure, typically 1,000-1,500 psi for a 3,000 psi system.

faq.question: How often should pre-charge be checked?
faq.answer: Pre-charge should be checked every 6 months or during routine maintenance.

faq.question: Can the bladder be replaced?
faq.answer: Yes, replacement bladders and seal kits are available for field replacement.

name: Eaton OF10 Hydraulic Return-Line Filter
description: The Eaton OF10 return-line filter removes particulate contamination from hydraulic system return flow. With 10 micron filtration and 100 L/min flow capacity, it protects pumps and valves from wear.
shortDescription: Return-line hydraulic filter, 10 micron, 100 L/min, spin-on cartridge.
technicalDescription: In-line return-line hydraulic filter with spin-on cartridge element. 10 micron absolute (ß10 ≥ 200) cellulose media. Bypass valve set at 3 bar. Visual and electrical clogging indicator.
benefits: Visual clogging indicator prevents unfiltered bypass
seoDescription: Eaton OF10 return-line hydraulic filter, 10 micron, 100 L/min, spin-on cartridge. For hydraulic power units and industrial oil circulation.

faq.question: What is the filter element material?
faq.answer: Standard element is cellulose media. Micro-fiber glass elements are available for higher efficiency.

faq.question: How often should the element be changed?
faq.answer: When the clogging indicator shows red (visual) or triggers the electrical switch, typically 6-12 months depending on system condition.

faq.question: Can this be installed on the pressure line?
faq.answer: No, this is a return-line filter rated for 20 bar. For pressure line filtration, use the OFP series.

name: Parker D1VW Directional Control Valve (D03)
description: The Parker D1VW is a direct-operated 4/3-way directional control valve with D03 (NG6) mounting pattern. Designed for solenoid operation with manual override, it controls the start, stop, and direction of hydraulic actuators.
technicalDescription: Direct-operated spool-type directional control valve with 4/3-way function, soft-shift solenoids (24 VDC), and manual emergency override. D03/NG6 CETOP mounting pattern with 80 L/min flow capacity.
features: 4/3-way spool design with multiple spool options
benefits: Reduces system shock with soft-shift design
Interchangeable with all D03 pattern valves
seoTitle: Parker D1VW D03 Directional Control Valve
seoDescription: Parker D1VW 4/3-way directional control valve, D03/NG6, 24VDC, 80 L/min, 350 bar. For cylinder and motor control in hydraulic systems.

faq.question: What spool configurations are available?
faq.answer: Available center positions: 0 (all ports blocked), 2 (P-A/B-T), 3 (P-A-B/T), and others.

faq.question: What voltage options are available?
faq.answer: Standard is 24 VDC. Options include 12 VDC, 115 VAC, and 230 VAC with rectifier.

faq.question: What is the response time?
faq.answer: Typical response time is 30-50 ms for solenoid energization and 20-40 ms for de-energization.
